description: Provides WHOIS lookup services for domain names, IP addresses, autonomous system numbers, and top-level domains to retrieve registration and allocation details.

tools.name: whois_domain
tools.description: Retrieve WHOIS registration data for a domain name.

domain.description: The fully-qualified domain name to query, e.g. "example.com".

domainName.description: The canonical domain name returned by the registry.

registrar.description: The accredited registrar responsible for the domain registration.

creationDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the domain was first registered.

updatedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to the domain record.

expirationDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the current registration expires.

nameServers.description: List of authoritative name servers for the domain.

status.description: Registry-level status codes (e.g., clientTransferProhibited) for the domain.

registrant.description: Contact information of the registrant, structure varies by registry.

tools.name: whois_ip
tools.description: Retrieve WHOIS allocation data for an IPv4 or IPv6 address.

ip.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to query, e.g. "8.8.8.8" or "2001:4860:4860::8888".

range.description: Human-readable IP range allocated to the organization.

netName.description: Registry label for the allocated network block.

organization.description: Organization name that holds the allocation.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the allocating entity.

cidr.description: CIDR notation of the allocated prefix.

updatedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the allocation record was last updated.

tools.name: whois_as
tools.description: Retrieve WHOIS information for an autonomous system number.

asn.description: Autonomous system number in ASxxxx format, e.g. "AS16509".

name.description: Short name assigned to the AS by the registry.

organization.description: Organization name that owns the autonomous system.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the AS holder.

routes.description: List of IP prefixes announced by this AS.

updatedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the AS record was last updated.

tools.name: whois_tld
tools.description: Retrieve WHOIS information for a top-level domain.

tld.description: Top-level domain to query, with or without leading dot, e.g. "com" or ".org".

sponsor.description: Entity responsible for operating the TLD registry.

whoisServer.description: Hostname of the authoritative WHOIS server for this TLD.

createdDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the TLD was delegated.

updatedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the TLD record was last updated.
